ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "calibration_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency at which the sensor needs to be calibrated (e.g., 30 days) */,
  "data_transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data transmission (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that generated the data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "sensor_value" REAL /* Value measured by the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of data collection (e.g., active, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Air Quality, Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the sensor measures */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format in which the sensor data is provided (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor involved in the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., average, peak) */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "responsible_user" TEXT /* User responsible for addressing the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
